tiles.name: Niches
tiles.description: Investment Banking institution types and market niches

institutions.name: Bulge Bracket Banks
institutions.description: Global investment banking institutions handling large cross-border deals and providing full financial services.

functions.name: Global M&A Advisory
functions.description: Advising corporations on large-scale mergers, acquisitions, and strategic transactions.

functions.name: Capital Markets Underwriting
functions.description: Structuring and underwriting IPOs, bond issuances, and other securities offerings.

functions.name: Cross-Border Deal Structuring
functions.description: Designing complex transaction structures across jurisdictions.

functions.name: Strategic Financial Advisory
functions.description: Providing board-level guidance on corporate strategy and financing.

institutions.name: Elite Boutique Advisory Firms
institutions.description: High-prestige advisory-only investment banks focused exclusively on M&A and restructuring.

functions.name: Pure M&A Advisory
functions.description: Providing independent advisory services without lending conflicts.

functions.name: Board-Level Strategic Advisory
functions.description: Guiding boards of directors on strategic deals and corporate restructuring.

functions.name: Shareholder Defense Advisory
functions.description: Advising companies against hostile takeovers.

functions.name: Special Situations Advisory
functions.description: Advising on restructurings and complex strategic transformations.

institutions.name: Middle-Market Investment Banks
institutions.description: Banks specializing in advising mid-sized companies on mergers, acquisitions, and capital raising.

functions.name: Mid-Market M&A Advisory
functions.description: Managing acquisitions and company sales in the mid-market segment.

functions.name: Private Company Sale Advisory
functions.description: Helping founders sell businesses to strategic buyers or private equity.

functions.name: Growth Capital Advisory
functions.description: Structuring financing rounds for expanding companies.

functions.name: Financial Restructuring Advisory
functions.description: Helping distressed companies restructure finances.

institutions.name: Industry-Specific Boutique Banks
institutions.description: Advisory firms specialized in specific sectors such as technology, healthcare, or energy.

functions.name: Sector-Specific M&A Advisory
functions.description: Advising companies within a specialized industry niche.

functions.name: Technology Deal Advisory
functions.description: Advising tech companies on acquisitions and strategic partnerships.

functions.name: Healthcare Transaction Advisory
functions.description: Managing deals for pharmaceutical and biotech firms.

functions.name: Industry Market Intelligence
functions.description: Providing specialized industry insights to support deal-making.

institutions.name: Regional Full-Service Investment Banks
institutions.description: Regional financial institutions providing advisory services and corporate lending for local companies.

functions.name: Regional M&A Advisory
functions.description: Advising regional champions on acquisitions and sales.

functions.name: Corporate Lending
functions.description: Providing loans and financing solutions to local companies.

functions.name: Regional Capital Markets
functions.description: Facilitating bond and equity issuance for regional businesses.

functions.name: Corporate Relationship Banking
functions.description: Maintaining long-term relationships with regional corporate clients.

tiles.name: Jobs
tiles.description: Career roles and positions in Investment Banking

tiles.name: Tasks
tiles.description: Key activities and responsibilities in Investment Banking
